title: store
content:
# store

This section contains 4 endpoints.

<CardGroup cols={2}>
<Card title="Returns pet inventories by status." href="/api-reference/store/get-store-inventory">
`GET` /store/inventory
</Card>
<Card title="Place an order for a pet." href="/api-reference/store/post-store-order">
`POST` /store/order
</Card>
<Card title="Find purchase order by ID." href="/api-reference/store/get-store-order-orderId">
`GET` /store/order/{orderId}
</Card>
<Card title="Delete purchase order by identifier." href="/api-reference/store/delete-store-order-orderId">
`DELETE` /store/order/{orderId}
</Card>
</CardGroup>
